tasks.label: bundle current file
tasks.command: (Get-Content ${file}) -replace '(cerr|std::cerr).+?;', ';' | Set-Content tmp.cpp; cmd /c 'oj-bundle tmp.cpp -I ${workspaceFolder} > submit.cpp'; code submit.cpp; Remove-Item tmp.cpp

tasks.label: setup random test
tasks.command: Get-Content 'template/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'gen.cpp'; Get-Content 'template/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'ans.cpp'; Get-Content 'template/checker.cpp' | Set-Content 'che.cpp'; code gen.cpp ans.cpp che.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (wcmp)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp checker/wcmp.cpp ${workspaceFolder}

tasks.label: run random test (rcmp6)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp checker/rcmp6.cpp ${workspaceFolder}

tasks.label: run random test (rcmp9)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp checker/rcmp9.cpp ${workspaceFolder}

tasks.label: run random test (custom judge)
tasks.command: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope Process; checker/judge.ps1 ${file} gen.cpp ans.cpp che.cpp ${workspaceFolder}
